common.tagline: Fully Automatic High-Speed Linear PET Blow Molding Machines

meta.title: RIBO | Fully Automatic High-Speed Linear PET Blow Molding
meta.description: RIBO designs and manufactures fully automatic high-speed linear PET blow molding machines for beverage, personal care, and food packaging production lines.
meta.keywords: PET blow molding machine,linear blow molder,automatic PET blowing machine,high-speed blow molding,PET bottle equipment,beverage bottle blower,stretch blow molding,packaging machinery,RIBO

hero.title: Fully Automatic High-Speed Linear PET Blow Molding Machines
hero.subtitle: Stable throughput, precise forming, and intelligent control to help your packaging line run faster and leaner.

products.title: Blow molding machine series
products.description: High-speed linear PET platforms engineered for stable output, precise forming, and efficient operation.

speed.title: High-Speed Stability
speed.description: Theoretical peak output up to 3,000 bottles per hour—top-tier performance among linear blow molding machines.

precision.title: Precise Forming
precision.description: China's first in-house full closed-loop constant-temperature control system—preform heating unaffected by voltage fluctuations, with 40% higher molding stability and precision.

energy.title: Energy Efficient
energy.description: Smart thermal control with six-motor servo coordination delivers high output while lowering energy per bottle.

service.title: Global Support
service.description: From on-site installation and maintenance training to remote troubleshooting on live machines—we deliver comprehensive after-sales service to customers worldwide.
